RemediationStrings.Title: NotifyMalicious (Smart Screen)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WTDS\Components\NotifyMalicious must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Smart Screen.

RemediationStrings.Title: NotifyPasswordReuse (Smart Screen)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WTDS\Components\NotifyPasswordReuse must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Smart Screen.

RemediationStrings.Title: NotifyUnsafeApp (Smart Screen)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WTDS\Components\NotifyUnsafeApp must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Smart Screen.

RemediationStrings.Title: ServiceEnabled (Smart Screen)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WTDS\Components\ServiceEnabled must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Smart Screen.
